text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Aaah... This power... It cannot be<n>coincidence.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am on the brink of awakening as the<n>Centurial
Overlord. In order to do so... I<n>must first surpass
Doto.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... I-I made it...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: T.M. Opera O loses to Meisho Doto.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
But this is no mere loss. Doto's<n>abilities now
match Opera O's,<n>sparking her motivation to
improve.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You did well. With this act concluded,<n>is it not time
to define our roles<n>between each other?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Answer me, Meisho Doto! Who are<n>you?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Are you my lifelong adversary? Do<n>you play a part
in Ragnarok, the<n>seemingly endless battle of the
gods?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ngghhh... Um... Uh...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Will I become your adversary?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I will... NOT!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Wha... How can this be?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Poignant words echo through the<n>crisp fall air in
Fuchu.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
After running with you today... now I<n>know for
sure that you're not my<n>enemy, Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You're my idol, the one I'll keep<n>running after—as
long as I liiiive!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I only got as strong as I am now<n>because of you...
And I can get even<n>stronger.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You're not my enemy, you're...<n>something more
comforting. There's<n>no reason for me to want to
hurt you.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So I want to be your... rival! Not your<n>adversary,
but your lifelong rival.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I want to be the rival who runs with<n>you
always—sometimes winning,<n>sometimes losing!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I think... I'll be happiest that way.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Happiest, you say...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well then, Doto... I see you have<n>found your
answer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Then so it shall be!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O pulls Meisho Doto to the<n>front of the
stands.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hear me! All fans in attendance!

From this day forth, Meisho Doto will<n>be my
closest rival!

I wish for you to watch our beautiful<n>bond as we
come to understand one<n>another through our
fierce battles on<n>the track.

And I hereby promise this! With a<n>worthy
adversary at my side, I will<n>continue to build my
shining<n>momentum...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And overcome the Golden Generation<n>at the
end-of-the-year Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Will that suffice, my dear friend Doto?

Yes! Um, also... Please do your best at<n>the Arima
Kinen!

So I shall. I'll do my part as ruler of<n>our generation
to represent you and<n>Ayabe as well.

And so their tale comes to a happy<n>conclusion,
with the two hand in hand<n>as friends and
competitors.

But the real battle starts now. The<n>mightiest
generation awaits the<n>mightiest king at the Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Let us be off, Trainer, to the last grand<n>spectacle.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
With Doto unable to join, it seems I<n>alone will
enter the fray against the<n>heroes of the previous
generation...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But fear not! With you at my side, we<n>can
overcome anything!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We exchange looks as we reaffirm<n>our fervent
determination. T.M. Opera<n>O then turns to the
sold-out stands.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ladies and gentlemen! I am T.M.<n>Opera O! And
today, my generation<n>has been unified.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We shall hereby be known as the<n>T.M. Opera
Opposition!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
As you are well aware, Umamusume<n>are entered
into the Arima Kinen<n>based on popular vote.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Which means your support is vital if I<n>am to make
it to the top. So hear me<n>now!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I beseech you, everyone gathered at<n>this track, to
vote for the T.M. Opera<n>Opposition! Together, we
cannot be<n>defeated!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She implores the crowd for their<n>votes. Perhaps
lost in the moment,<n>she begins sounding like a
politician.
